lead.title: Open-weights model matches frontier reasoning at a fraction of the cost
lead.summary: A newly released 70B model trained on a synthetic reasoning corpus posts frontier-tier scores on math and code benchmarks while running on a single consumer GPU — reshaping the open-vs-closed debate overnight.

top_stories.title: Anthropic ships long-horizon agent tooling for the API
top_stories.summary: New primitives let agents plan and recover across multi-hour tasks without losing state.

top_stories.title: EU finalises rules for general-purpose model providers
top_stories.summary: Transparency and evaluation duties take effect, with phased deadlines into 2027.

top_stories.title: Two-year-old inference startup raises a $400M round
top_stories.summary: Funding targets custom silicon and a cheaper hosted-inference tier for open models.

items.title: A simpler recipe for test-time compute scaling
items.summary: Researchers show a verifier-free loop that lifts accuracy with budget alone.

items.title: Long-context retrieval without the quadratic tax
items.summary: A sparse-attention variant holds quality past one million tokens.

items.title: Benchmark contamination, measured at last
items.summary: A new audit estimates how much leaderboard gain is memorisation.

items.title: Distillation that keeps the teacher's calibration
items.summary: Small models inherit uncertainty estimates, not just answers.

items.title: New 8B multilingual model lands with permissive licence
items.summary: Strong on translation and code across forty languages.

items.title: Quantised weights cut VRAM to fit 16GB cards
items.summary: Community release keeps most of the quality at half the memory.

items.title: A small vision-language model for on-device use
items.summary: Runs offline on a phone with usable captioning and OCR.

items.title: Reference fine-tuning scripts get a major rewrite
items.summary: Lower memory, fewer footguns, sane defaults out of the box.

items.title: An IDE extension that drafts and runs evals for you
items.summary: Turns a spec into a test suite, then grades model output.

items.title: Voice-first note app adds local transcription
items.summary: No cloud round-trip; the model runs on the laptop.

items.title: Open framework for multi-agent orchestration hits 1.0
items.summary: Typed message passing and built-in tracing for agent graphs.

Robotics lab demos dexterous manipulation policy
New leaderboard tracks energy per token, not just speed
Chip maker teases inference accelerator for laptops
Dataset of permissively-licensed code crosses 5T tokens
Court declines to block model-training fair-use claim
Open TTS voices now clone from thirty seconds of audio
